author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر محمد بن الحسين بن عبد الله الآجُرِّيُّ البغدادي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent Sunni scholar known for his contributions to Islamic ethics and spirituality, particularly within the Hanbali school.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A well-regarded work on self-discipline and ethical refinement within the Sunni tradition.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Widely studied for its practical guidance on combating the ego and cultivating piety.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Abu Ubaydah Mashhur bin Hasan Al-Salman is a respected contemporary editor known for his meticulous work on classical texts.
